params._beneficiary: Address that will receive vested tokens
params._token: Address of the SRC token contract
params._vestingDuration: Total vesting duration from start in seconds (e.g., 2 years = 63072000)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

claim().notice: Claim vested tokens. Only beneficiary can call.

claimable().notice: Calculate tokens available to claim right now

revoke().notice: Revoke vesting. Unvested tokens are returned to owner (multisig).         Beneficiary keeps already vested (but unclaimed) tokens.         Can only be called by owner (multisig).

revoked().notice: Whether the vesting has been revoked

totalAllocation().notice: Total tokens allocated to this vesting schedule

vestedAmount().notice: Calculate total tokens vested up to now

vestedAtRevoke().notice: Amount vested at the time of revocation

documentation.text: @notice Total tokens allocated to this vesting schedule
@notice Whether the vesting has been revoked
@notice Amount vested at the time of revocation

@notice Calculate total tokens vested up to now
 @return Total vested amount (including already claimed)

@notice Calculate tokens available to claim right now
 @return Claimable amount

@notice Calculate unvested tokens remaining
 @return Unvested amount
@notice Claim vested tokens. Only beneficiary can call.
